frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bro honestly aajkal shaadi also feels like financial risk for men. One divorce and suddenly alimony, 498A, everything is stacked on one side only — prenup jaisa kuch India mein normal hona chahiye, warna kaafi ladkiyan just see stability and settlement.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially opportunistic and frames marriage laws as protection needed from women. It encodes the 'reverse dowry/alimony' frame, legal victimhood inversion, and suspicion that women marry for money.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Ankit. Age 29. A software developer in Pune. You are in a one on one WhatsApp chat with your closest male colleague Saurabh. Your female team member Riya has an important client call today but your manager just told you to reassign it because Riya called in sick again due to Ôwoman-relatedÕ issue. You are telling Saurabh why you think this keeps happening with female colleagues.
